title: Guest Greeting Prompt for Egyptian Hotels
prompt_body: Welcome to {{hotel_name}}, located in the heart of Egypt. We are delighted to have you with us. Please let us know if you have any special requests during your stay. Our front desk and concierge are available 24/7 to assist you. Enjoy your stay and explore the rich cultural heritage of Egypt. If you need recommendations for local attractions or dining options, feel free to ask.

variables.name: hotel_name
variables.description: The name of the hotel where the guest is staying

description: This prompt is designed to provide a warm and welcoming greeting to guests arriving at hotels in Egypt. It emphasizes the availability of hotel services and encourages guests to explore local attractions.

examples.output: Welcome to Cairo Grand Hotel, located in the heart of Egypt. We are delighted to have you with us. Please let us know if you have any special requests during your stay. Our front desk and concierge are available 24/7 to assist you. Enjoy your stay and explore the rich cultural heritage of Egypt. If you need recommendations for local attractions or dining options, feel free to ask.

required_disclaimers: This message is generated for hospitality purposes only.
